title: More Nonsense Limerick 87
content:
There was an old person of Stroud,
    Who was horribly jammed in a crowd;
    Some she slew with a kick, 
    Some she scrunched with a stick,
    That impulsive old person of Stroud.
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 87" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
